case_title: MVP I, LLC VS. SONG LIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, SONG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, SONG
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC SERVED JUL-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-31-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, SONG
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, SONG

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, SONG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 KING STREET #731, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94158, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MVP I, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, SONG
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, SONG
